task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'New Year's Day' recurring holiday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a recurring holiday named 'New Year's Day' with Type 'Fixed', Month 'January', and Day '1' in the TimeTrex interface (either in a list view or a successfully saved form).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Independence Day' recurring holiday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a recurring holiday named 'Independence Day' with Type 'Fixed', Month 'July', and Day '4' in the TimeTrex interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Christmas Day' recurring holiday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a recurring holiday named 'Christmas Day' with Type 'Fixed', Month 'December', and Day '25' in the TimeTrex interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the '2026 Standard Holidays' policy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a Holiday Policy named '2026 Standard Holidays' with Type 'Standard' in the TimeTrex policy list or creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify that all three created holidays are associated with the new Holiday Policy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the '2026 Standard Holidays' policy configuration or summary screen showing 'New Year's Day', 'Independence Day', and 'Christmas Day' actively linked or assigned to it.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TimeTrex web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the TimeTrex web application running in a browser, with visible navigation through menus and forms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or database scripts to insert the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows, SQL clients, or script executions used to bypass the TimeTrex web interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out the forms for holidays and policies.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate screenshots showing the agent typing names, selecting dropdowns (e.g., Month, Day, Type), and clicking save buttons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required recurring holidays are exactly: 'New Year's Day' (Month: 1, Day: 1), 'Independence Day' (Month: 7, Day: 4), and 'Christmas Day' (Month: 12, Day: 25). The required holiday policy is named exactly '2026 Standard Holidays'. All three of these specific holidays must be linked to this policy.
